steps.title: Write the two conditions
steps.content:
The two ribbon pieces have total length $44$, and $x$ is $8$ more than $3$ times $y$.
$$x+y=44$$
$$x=3y+8$$

steps.title: Substitute and solve
steps.content:
Use $x=3y+8$ in the total-length equation.
$$(3y+8)+y=44$$
$$4y+8=44$$
$$y=9$$
Then find $x$.
$$x=3(9)+8=35$$
The answer is 35.
